evals.prompt: I just edited my ~/.claude/hooks/status.py file to add better error handling. I want to sync this change back to my dotfiles. Show me what changed and sync it.
evals.expected_output: Shows diff of the status.py changes, asks for confirmation, commits and pushes to dotfiles repo

evals.prompt: I modified my wezterm config to add a new keybinding. How do I sync this to my dotfiles so it's available on other machines?
evals.expected_output: Detects the ~/.config/wezterm/wezterm.lua change, shows the diff, syncs it to chezmoi

evals.prompt: Check if my dotfiles are in sync with my local configs. I'm worried I might have made some changes that aren't tracked.
evals.expected_output: Scans all tracked files, reports if anything is out of sync, shows diffs if there are changes
